Table of Contents

Interface IXMLTypeMapper3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that convert to and from XML to native types.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("551C10E7-AE94-4FDF-8D24-4B55F674C8FA")]
public interface IXMLTypeMapper3 : IXMLTypeMapper2, IXMLTypeMapper
